---
title: nested-structs
description: "Discourage anonymous nested struct types."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Discourage anonymous nested struct types. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
type User struct { Address struct { City string } }
```

## Good

```go
type Address struct { City string }
type User struct { Address Address }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only nested-structs`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `note`.
